results.input_question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

candidate.question: Which trials have Control arm equal to Multikinase inhibitor?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

candidate.question: Colorectal cancer trials with Number of arms >= 4.
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 4;
candidate.parent_question: Find Colorectal cancer trials with at least 4 arms where the control treatment was Chemo/Anti-EGFR?

candidate.question: Among those, which have at least 4 arms?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 4;
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Colorectal cancer had at least 4 arms and used Chemotherapy as a control?

synthesized.raw_text: {"sql": "SELECT \"NCT\", \"Trial name\", \"Cancer type\", \"Number of arms\", \"Control regimen\", \"Control arm\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Number of arms\" >= 3 AND \"Control arm\" = 'Multikinase inhibitor'"}
synthesized.final_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Number of arms", "Control regimen", "Control arm" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor'

sql_with_conf_row.question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
sql_with_conf_row.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
sql_with_conf_row.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Number of arms", "Control regimen", "Control arm" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor'
